description: JSON Schema for the copilot benchmark test set (one JSON object per line)
file_format: jsonl (one JSON object per line, UTF-8, no BOM)

id.description: Stable identifier. Format cNNN. Loader matches predictions by this id.

task.description: Task type — drives scoring groups in by_task summary.

prompt.description: The actual prompt sent to the model. Chinese prompt expected.

reference_checks.description: Programmatic checks against model output. See specs/scoring-rules.json for full semantics.

loader_tolerance: scorer accepts aliases: 'task' -> 'type', 'value' -> 'keywords' -> 'args' (in that order). See score_one().
evolution_note: Earlier draft docs mentioned task names 'claim_check' and 'keyword_audit' (pre-test_50 design); the actual released test_50 uses the 5 task names above. This spec is the source of truth.
